hotel_name: Khách sạn Mường Thanh Holiday Hội An (Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel)

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: No gluten free food in the breakfast. Even when you request them for the same. No god service. None of the staff knows  English. Complete Mismanagement, no one listens to The clients requirements for hours.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for sharing your feedback on Agoda.
We sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet expectations, especially regarding the gluten-free breakfast request and the service provided. This is not the standard we aim to deliver.
Your comments have been shared with the relevant teams for improvement, particularly in food preparation and staff communication. We truly value your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back with a better experience.
Kind regards, Tran Quoc Viet (Mr.) - General Manager

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.negatives:
We tried their restaurant at lunch and were the only people there. Waited 40 minutes for the food and when it came, it was no good at all. 

Breakfast was also bad with just some food and not many options. We were there 1 hour before closing. Many people working but everything was empty and it feels weird for us guests to tell them to refill everything.

They offer bike rental 100K VND/day but there were never any bikes available. We asked all 3 days we stayed with them.

They also offer to borrow umbrellas but they were "finished" all 3 days also. This even though it was low season. There were not even many guests at the hotel. And for such a grand hotel, how can bikes and umbrellas not be available?

Our toiled had some leaking which made the whole floor wet..

They offer no shuttle bus or transportation service. Which was very inconvenient since the hotel is placed at a place where it is not near anything. They told us to call a taxi ourselves. 

Says they have a private beach, but when we got there. There were no sunbeds. It was a few on the beach offered by other people and they all costed money.

When we checked in, they said we had free water in our room. But when we checked out, they asked us to pay for the water.
They also told us to sit and wait while they check the room during check out. We sat on their sofa for 15 minutes and waited. Many staff there saw us but no one asked if we needed any help. After we waited 15 minutes (and also our taxi driver) we went and asked them if the room was OK. They said "yes, it is okay and you can leave". Very upsetting experience, as they asked us to wait, saw us waiting for so long and still didn't give us the information that we could leave. Bad staff and bad greetings.

Not recommended.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Food made some one stomach ache. Prices were not fair. Bad room is so bad
reviews.response:
Dear Ms/Mr. Lê,
I am very disappointed to hear that you found our service to be below your standards. We would like to know more. Please email us with a phone number or email address so our Hotel Manager can discuss your issues personally.
Best regards,
Luong Phong (Mr.) - General Manager

reviews.title: Disappointing stay, basic hygiene not catered for, no hand soap or hot water.
reviews.positives: The staff were nice.
reviews.negatives: Booked 2 rooms but neither rooms had any hot water even though we raised this matter daily. No hand soap, had to use tubes of shower gel, no bedside lights and neither safes in the rooms were working. My safe was repaired after 2 days. Meant to stay for 8 nights but left after 4 nights. We stayed in Hanoi, Ningh Bingh, Vue and Hoi An. This by far was the most expensive hotel that lacked the basic facilities expected of a hotel. We stayed in much cheaper and more basic hotels in Vietnam which excelled in our expectations. The staff were nice but overall our stay at the Mount Thanh was very disappointing. Still waiting for Booking.com to answer my last 3 messages I sent regarding our stay.

reviews.title: Need improvement
reviews.text: 2 1/2 star - Not expensive.But The room air conditioning noisy and not working properly. The toilet ventilation is noisy, unpleasant smell from the toilet and floor carpet.the balconies was dirty and some insects in the room 🐜🦟.The hotel corridor along the rooms was with uncollected food leftovers .The guest lifts was dirty and smell. The swimming pool was dirty. Food & Breakfast just ok. No free hotel shuttle transport to Hoian town.Hopefully this can be improved.
reviews.response: Dear Mr. Mark Cheng. Thank you for your feedback. We're very sorry to hear about the issues you encountered — from the air conditioning and unpleasant smells to cleanliness in some areas. Your comments have been shared with the relevant departments for immediate improvement. We take guest feedback seriously and are committed to enhancing our services. We sincerely apologize and will conduct an internal review to hold the responsible staff accountable. This experience does not reflect our standards, and we truly regret falling short during your visit. We hope to welcome you back in the future for a much better experience. Kind regards, Pham Thuyen (Mr.) - General Manager.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Room was tidy and clean.
reviews.negatives: Reception staff weren't very welcoming and helpful. Could do with some bedroom side lamps, rather than the main room switch. Told it was insect season but then some of the doors were open in reception / lobby. Water thermostat needs changing in the room for the shower as you couldn't take it from cold to hot. One pillow per bed and no extras.

reviews.title: Not recommded!
reviews.text: The restaurant' s kichen has no hood therefore smells of cooking oil reached everywhere and chinese tourist groups spoke to loudly at breakfast.  Hotel not recommended!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Dinh Thi Le, 
Firstly, we would like to say sorry for any inconvenience may caused during your stay! We never wish our dear customers left the hotel with the feeling like that and we feel really bad. We are constantly improving the quality of our services. Hope to have another chance to prove you the better service!
With our best regards, 
Tuyen Ms. - Sales Executive

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I was not well, but we had a big room with seperate lounge which made it a little eaiser.
reviews.negatives: The TV options, not much options for westerners. Seeing 2 cockroach's, one in the room and one outside our door.

reviews.title: dated rundown hotel defiantly not 4 star
reviews.text: hotel is poorly built and rundown. carpets in executive suite were stained and smelled. pool deck is decrepit and the beach is across the road. stay away from this place there are far better ones.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Vytus
we do apologize for your uncomfortableness during you stay at our resort. Naturally, we are disappointed when our guests do not receive the normal high level of services. We greatly value your comments which help us identify areas which fall short of our usual standards. We will rectify the shortfalls quickly.
Respectfully,
Hoang Thuy (Ms - General Manager)

reviews.title: Much better options nearby
reviews.positives: The hotel was a good hotel but unfortunately the area has declined since covid and does need some repairs and revamping. Both our showers didnt work when we arrived and they did fix them straight away. There is a great pool with only a few chairs and the beach is a very short walk across the road. Cua Dai beach town is a 900 metre walk away, too short for a grab taxi and a little far too walk in the sun. The staff are very friendly and our breakfast was very good.
reviews.negatives: The location is just too far from restaurants and cafes too walk and it is in need of a revamp but I dont think they are getting enough customers to pay for it.

reviews.title: Very disappointing stay.
reviews.text: Lack of attention from staff. English language skills poor. Bar for drinks unattended and when we could get a glass of wine it was clear the bottle had been open way too long and wine was vinegar!!
reviews.response: Thank you so much for your feedback

reviews.title: Abandoned Resort - And that is a good thing
reviews.positives: Super quiet "far from everything" place, if you look for some silence in Vietnam - this is the place. Superb view to the river. Carpets, so no one will make noise dragging furniture
reviews.negatives: Still could hear some noisy neighbours in the bathroom, a slight mold smell but healthy enough for 1 night stay, breakfast is the worse I ever saw in an hotel but i didn't expect anything from it anyway :D Just order some banh mi in Grab for 25k and you are good

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Such a big hotel chain and did not a centralised AC. The temperature being almost to a high outside and the room just had a small AC at the door which couldn’t even cover the entire room. Boasting as such a huge chain of hotels and such lame maintenance, really bad. The food also did not have much options for foreigners. 
Would definitely not visit back  and will not recommend to others as well.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Muong Thanh Hoi An Hotel.

We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the air-conditioning system and the dining options available during your stay. We understand how important a comfortable room temperature is, especially during warmer weather, and we apologize for the inconvenience caused.

Your comments concerning the room cooling efficiency and the variety of food options for international guests have been noted and shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement. Feedback such as yours is invaluable in helping us enhance our facilities and services.

We are truly sorry that we were unable to provide the experience you expected and appreciate your candid comments. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future and offer you a much-improved stay.

Kind regards./.
Trần Quốc Việt (Mr.) _

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff working here is exceptional. When I complained that my room was a bit damf and had a strong citronella smell, they didn't just change my room, they upgraded it! What a wonderful service. The pool is big and nice! And the location is peaceful.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast is till 9am - kinda strange, would be good to have it at least till 9:30am. The hallways are dark, and the whole property feels a bit cold for some reason. maybe because there are not too many people, which is actually very good ;)

reviews.title: Mediocre to low quality stay
reviews.text: Stayed a night. Arrived late, carpark was full had to park on street. No chance to take a shower, obviosly there was clean water coming out of tap. It was fixed next morning. Not an acceptable practice in hospitality practice
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Can,
Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your experience at our hotel. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you faced during your stay. 
Please rest assured that we are taking your feedback seriously and are reviewing our procedures to ensure such issues do not occur in the future. Your comfort and satisfaction are our top priorities.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.
Kind Regards,
Tran Anh Thu (Mrs.) - General Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The location is just perfect. The staff were very friendly and helpful especially Thao. Had an amazing 3 nights there.

reviews.title: A bad experience at Mường Thanh Hội An.
reviews.text: I was really disappointed with the breakfast at Mường Thanh Hội An on the morning of June 30th. Although there were few guests (50), the hotel arranged for guests to eat in a small conference room with 7 dining tables (5 square tables for 4 people and 2 round tables for 10 people) while the Tra Que restaurant right next door was left empty. They had a very limited selection of food, trying to cut costs as much as possible, which made me feel that the hotel did not respect its customers. Not to mention that the hotel is old, the pool has cloudy water, and it's far from the city center. Overall, it was very poor considering the price of around 1 million dong per night. I will not come back!
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Hiếu, Thay mặt Ban Giám đốc và toàn thể nhân viên khách sạn, tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành đến anh vì đã lựa chọn khách sạn cho kỳ nghỉ vừa qua, cũng như đã dành thời gian đóng góp những ý kiến quý báu.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi trải nghiệm của anh chưa thực sự trọn vẹn. Liên quan đến tình trạng nước hồ bơi bị đục, do ảnh hưởng của mưa lớn kéo dài trong hai ngày 29–30/6, nước đã bị thay đổi màu sắc tạm thời. Ngay sau đó, khách sạn đã tiến hành xử lý và khử khuẩn; đến nay, nước hồ bơi đã được làm sạch và trong xanh trở lại.
Chúng tôi luôn trân trọng mọi ý kiến đóng góp và sẽ tiếp tục nỗ lực để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo. 
Rất mong được đón tiếp và phục vụ anh chu đáo hơn trong những lần sau.
Trân trọng, Phạm Văn Thuyên (Mr.) - Giám đốc Điều hành Khách sạn

reviews.title: Our stay was good but we prefer smaller establishments.
reviews.positives: Excellent breakfast buffet, the hotel caters to tourists groups, large bus loads of tourists.  Nice pool.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom facilities were not ideal for seniors or anyone who may have any physical disabilities.  You have to  climb into and out a high bathtub and hope you don’t slip.  There is only a partial glass and a partial shower curtain to prevent water splash.  It is poorly designed and water leaks onto the floor.

reviews.title: Cheap price = cheap service
reviews.text: Hotel was ok for the price and so was the service you you get what you pay for please note not to arrange tour with the hotel as expensive tour arrangment and hidden costs would exist
reviews.response: Thank you so much for your feedback

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: la chambre et le petit-déjeuner
reviews.negatives: l'ambiance impersonnelle et sans animation

reviews.title: I never want to go back this hotel again
reviews.text:
Hi there,
It was a terrible time for me to stay in this hotel. I just stayed in this hotel from April 20 to April 22, 2018. So bad experience that I have never seen in other Muong Thanh hotels in other provinces in Vietnam. Many Chinese people were stayed in here and it was a terrible noisy at swimming pool, at lobby and especially in restaurant. Besides, the breakfast time was informed from 6am to 10am but I could start my breakfast from 8am since it was too busy in the restaurant from 7am to 8am by Chinese groups. It was surprised us – Vietnamese, western, Korean and oversea guests while hotel’s staffs did keep replying that “no more food” when all the foods were clean up already. Even, the western man asked for Coffee but the restaurant staff told him that “no more coffee”. I were getting shock why all the foods were clean up by Chinese guests but the hotel restaurant not added for foods. Didn’t they control for food delivering? It was so irresponsible from hotel’s supervisor
reviews.response:
Dear Nguyen
Warmest greetings from Muong Thanh Hoi An Hotel!
Thank you so much for sharing your review. We are really regret that your holiday was not as expected for a holiday during your stay
We greatly value your comments which help us identify areas which fall short of our usual standards. We will rectify the shortfalls quickly. 
Best Regards!
Ms Hoang Thuy - General Manager

reviews.title: En dessous de ses étoiles
reviews.positives: Un problème sanitaire nous a fait changer de chambre et nous avons été surclassé après insistance
reviews.negatives:
Cet hôtel dispose de nombreux équipements de confort mais n’est pas confortable au quotidien : pas une seule chaise dans une suite avec pourtant un grand salon de 5 places, pas de lampes de chevet, éclairage de la salle de bains tellement tamisé qu’il est impossible de s’y maquiller. De même une grande piscine mais avec autour juste quelques chaises en métal et 5 ou 6 transats en lattes de bois sans matelas. 
Petit déjeuner répétitif et décevant même si le personnel est souriant mais très limité en anglais.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: it is so so
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Khách sạn xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú và dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá trên Agoda.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng trải nghiệm của Quý khách chưa đạt được như mong đợi. Đây chắc chắn không phải là tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ mà khách sạn luôn hướng đến.
Chúng tôi rất mong nhận được thêm những chia sẻ cụ thể hơn về những điểm chưa hài lòng để Ban Quản lý có thể xem xét, cải thiện và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ trong thời gian tới. Ý kiến của Quý khách là cơ sở quan trọng giúp chúng tôi hoàn thiện và phục vụ khách hàng tốt hơn mỗi ngày.
Hy vọng khách sạn sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại để mang đến một trải nghiệm tốt đẹp và trọn vẹn hơn.
Trân trọng, Trần Quốc Việt (Mr.) - Giám đốc điều hành

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hôtel très propre et spacieux. Confortable.
reviews.negatives: Il fallait prendre le petit déjeuner avant 9h. Pas cool pour les vacances. Il faut marcher un peu pour la plage et les restaurants. Le petit déjeuner n est pas copieux pur les européens.

reviews.title: Lovely staff, but that’s all they’ve got!
reviews.text:
Disappointing! Facilities were poor; food was horrendous at breakfast, stale food and poor variety. The restaurant had limited menu and very little vegetarian food. The staff were lovely but not very attentative. The pool was closed for three days and when it was open, there was no atmosphere or service. 
The beach was average and whilst it was supposed to be private for the hotel, they didn’t offer any service when there. 
Location was terrible as well. 
Below average, that’s my review!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Excentré mais près d’une belle et grande plage , donc peu fréquentée . Grande chambre, piscine (dès 6h du mat) buffet petit déjeuner. Bien loin du tumulte du centre ville

reviews.title: Staff still chit chat in the restaurant ignoring the customers
reviews.text: The location is far from the ancient city. The facilities are not new, not in good maintenance. Staff is still not customer focused!
reviews.response:

Ms Hoang Thuy - General Manager

reviews.negatives: Prévoir un scooter, ou une voiture pour aller au centre ville car c’est un peu excentré du centre historique.

Excellent hôtel, personnel réception chaleureux, professionnel (Madame Thảo).
Cuisine de bonne qualité.
reviews.negatives: Rien.

reviews.title: Vệ sinh tệ
reviews.text:
Bể bơi rất bẩn, dường như đã cả vài tháng họ không làm sạch bể bơi. Trên thành bể thì bụi đóng cặn 1 lớp rất dày và vị trí nào thành bể cũng bẩn, dưới đáy bể thì bụi bẩn, rác nhiều, nước bể chua 1 cách khó hiểu, bể bơi là trải nghiệm tệ nhất ở đây. 
Phòng có mùi ẩm mốc nhẹ.
Vị trí gần bãi biển, phù hợp cho gia đình đi nghỉ muốn gần biển.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Quý khách,
Khách sạn xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi sau kỳ nghỉ vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi trải nghiệm tại hồ bơi và chất lượng phòng nghỉ chưa đáp ứng được mong đợi của Quý khách.
Những góp ý liên quan đến tình trạng vệ sinh hồ bơi, mùi ẩm trong phòng cùng các vấn đề bảo dưỡng đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận nghiêm túc và chuyển đến các bộ phận liên quan để kiểm tra, khắc phục trong thời gian sớm nhất. Chúng tôi hiểu rằng điều này đã ảnh hưởng không nhỏ đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng của Quý khách và chân thành xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện này.
Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng rất cảm ơn Quý khách đã ghi nhận vị trí thuận tiện gần biển – một trong những điểm được nhiều gia đình yêu thích khi lưu trú tại đây.
Hy vọng khách sạn sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong tương lai với những trải nghiệm tốt đẹp và trọn vẹn hơn.
Trân trọng, Trần Quốc Việt (Mr.) - Giám đốc điều hành

reviews.title: Un beau séjour à Hoi An
reviews.positives: La piscine propre, la plage juste en face, un très bon restaurant, un magasin et un massage à 5 min à pied de l'hôtel. Le personnel adorable, souriant et disponible. Je recommande !
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner était très restreint mais j'avais l'impression que l'hôtel n'était pas plein cette semaine.

reviews.title: Old hotel
reviews.text: Mường Thanh hotel is the worst I have ever stayed at. The Mường Thanh hotels are generally quite old but usually clean; however, this one in Hội An is not only old but also has a very unpleasant smell in the room. The furnishings are the most basic among all Mường Thanh hotels. The location is convenient for swimming at Cửa Đại beach, and the pool is fairly okay, but the breakfast has few options. I probably won't come back here.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi chị Vân,
Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng trải nghiệm của chị tại khách sạn chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng.
Khách sạn xin ghi nhận các phản hồi của chị liên quan đến tình trạng cơ sở vật chất, mùi phòng và nội thất. Đây là những góp ý rất quý báu để chúng tôi xem xét và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ trong thời gian tới.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc vì đã mang đến cảm giác chưa hài lòng cho chị trong kỳ nghỉ, và chúng tôi vẫn hy vọng sẽ có một cơ hội khác để phục vụ chị tốt hơn.
Chân thành cảm ơn chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm thực tế của mình.
Trân trọng, Phạm Văn Thuyên (Mr.) - Giám đốc Điều hành Khách sạn

reviews.title: Unvergesslicher Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Super Aufenthalt,  ich habe nochmals verlängert. Alle Anfragen wurden sofort zu 100% ausgeführt, vielen Dank an Hiep, Thao, Tri und an das gesamte Personal in der Gastronomie. reviews.text: Claims to have an open spa, it doesn’t work, claims to have entertainment at night, again it doesn’t, claims to have karaoke rooms, they do but they’re run down and looks like last used when Michael Jackson was still about, if it wasn’t for all the false promises it would’ve been great, but for the price you pay compared to other hotels it isn’t worth the extra money.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for your feedback.
We are truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. However, we would like to clarify that once the spa and karaoke services were suspended, these facilities were also removed from our official Booking channel. Therefore, we sincerely regret any misunderstanding, but we do not advertise these services when they are unavailable.
Your comments regarding the overall value and facilities have been noted, and we will continue working to improve our services and communication.
We appreciate your feedback and hope to have another opportunity to better serve you in the future.
Kind regards, Tran Quoc Viet (Mr.) - General Manager

reviews.title: На 4 звезды соответствует, тихое место, рядом отличный пляж.
reviews.positives: Понравилось: Номер, Бассейн всегда почти пустой и чистый, полотенца у бассейна, 100 метров до хорошего пляжа где тоже нет почти никого, тихо, рядом в пешей доступности рестораны, вид на реку и море, отзывчивый сервис - все проблемы (плохо работал один из кондиционеров в номере, закрепить зеркало в спальне, отремонтировать переключатель в душе) решались быстро и оперативно. Сервис - молодцы. Транспорт из отеля в аэропорт просто супер и цена отличная. Скидки 15% на напитки и стирку одежды. 9 лет назад мы через Booking отдыхали в Отеле Golden Sand который расположен рядом, но он сейчас не работает. Выбрали этот отель и очень рады были провести в нем 14 дней.
reviews.negatives:
НЕ понравилось: прежде всего завтраки - все вроде есть но приготовлено не вкусно, просто плохой повар. Даже стандартный  вьетнамский суп все время был плохим. С фруктами к счастью все было нормально на завтраке.
В нашем номере было два балкона - но ни стульев ни столика не было, попросили принести хоть что-то чтобы можно было посидеть на балконе - сервис принес сразу, молодцы.  Сушилка для вещей как заявлено полностью отсутствует в номере что очень странно. Отель не смог решить эту проблему с сушилкой для белья.

reviews.title: Nice Stay, But not great! Good quiet location!
reviews.text: We stayed here for a 3 nights. It was nice but overrun with Korean tourist groups. They were loud in the morning about 8 AM. The service I felt knew when they would make mistakes but didnt do anything to make the stay better. Our air con didnt work well 1 night and we actually got locked ino our room the first night. If we didn't order room service we would not have known the door didnt open until the morning. They had to have a few people sent to the room, they ended up locking themselves in our room while we ate a little then had a service man come up. Though they did get right on it. All we received was an apology at the counter a few days later. Nothing! Even after I said that it ruined our first night having to deal with that for 30 mins after we just arrived late at night. Im not one to expect amazing things but something wouldve been nice. Maybe a free massage because no one even seemed to use that area. Just something could have been done when it is clearly a safety issue!
reviews.response:
Dear Stephen
Warmest greetings from Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel
Firstly, thank you very much for choosing Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotelas address in Viet Nam. We really appreciate your detail review very much.
Secondly, we do apologize for your uncomfortableness during you stay at our hotel. Naturally, we are disappointed when our guests do not receive the normal high level of services. We greatly value your comments which help us identify areas which fall short of our usual standards. We will rectify the shortfalls quickly.
Finally, please do not allow this to deter you from returning. Kindly contact us where we will welcome you back ensuring your visit surprises your expectations for which are our intention with every guest.
Regard!
Hong Ngo- General Manager

reviews.text:
The good:  Big clean pool, free buffet breakfast, quiet, spacious and airy room, and bath, big balcony with views, full amenities.
The bad: weak water pressure on 6th floor.  Location is distance from the old quarter.  No services in the immediate area - some are about 1km away.
Others: facility is dated, dim hallway,
Bottom line:  4-star accommodation for lower budget.
reviews.response:

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed review of your recent stay at Muong Thanh Hoi An Hotel.
We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our spacious and airy room, large balcony views, swimming pool, complimentary buffet breakfast, and the peaceful atmosphere of the hotel. Your kind comments about the cleanliness and amenities are truly appreciated by our team.
At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the weak water pressure on the 6th floor and for any disappointment regarding the hallway lighting and the dated aspects of our facilities. Your feedback is valuable and has been shared with our management and maintenance teams for consideration and improvement.
Regarding the location, while our hotel offers a quiet and relaxing environment away from the busy old quarter, we understand this may not be ideal for every traveler. We always strive to assist guests with transportation and local recommendations to make their stay more c

I want to relax! I want to get away from the hustle and bustle! Recommended for people ♬

Disadvantages:
No hot water in the morning
Noisy during the day due to construction sounds
Gym is not maintained
Breakfast is not a buffet

Advantages:
Nights are quiet
The beach is right in front

reviews.title: The presentation is a bit unprofessional.
reviews.text: The hotel has a widespread traditional style of Muong Thanh, but the room was not very clean upon check-in; the floor of the room was dusty and not clean, and the bathroom floor was also not entirely clean. Especially, the breakfast was very poor. The hotel management should look for other solutions instead of being so frugal. When there are few guests, they serve breakfast in a very small room, with the buffet line set up outside, which feels very unprofessional. The bread was dry and hard due to the lack of a toaster during quiet times. The buffet service staff was also not enthusiastic. The coffee was terribly diluted, and when food ran out, it wasn't replenished. It was too basic. The next day, we skipped breakfast. On the last day, when a large group of guests arrived, they served breakfast in the larger main restaurant. However, the quality and quantity of the food were still basic, only slightly better than the first day. Breakfast ended at 9 AM, which is too early, and by 8:20-30 AM, many items had run out and were not replenished. I am sincerely suggesting that the hotel reconsider and regain a better image. We have stayed at many other Muong Thanh branches, but this was the place with the most basic breakfast. The buffet staff was also not as friendly as in other places.

reviews.title: Great Hotel at the beach, just a cheap GRAB away to all main attractions , Noise free
reviews.positives:
I absolutely loved my stay at this hotel! The service was exceptional, and all the employees went above and beyond to make my experience unforgettable. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a fantastic getaway.

The breakfast provided caters well to Western tastes, ensuring a satisfying start to the day. The pool is also very comfortable, allowing you to enjoy a refreshing swim. Furthermore, there are additional facilities such as a ping pong table and billiard table, which provide entertainment options for those looking for a little fun. The lobby is spacious and provides a great area for waiting and relaxing.

Considering the price and the level of service offered, this hotel is truly a perfect match. I highly recommend it for families, as it provides a comfortable and enjoyable stay. Moreover, the hotel's location is convenient, as it is not too far from the old city. A quick and reasonably priced Grab ride, costing around 100K dongs each way, will easily take you there.

Overall, the hotel offers a fantastic beach, great amenities, and an excellent price-to-service ratio, making it an ideal choice for families or anyone looking for a memorable stay in the area.
reviews.negatives:
I did notice a couple of areas that could use a little improvement. Firstly, I would like to suggest fixing the swing in the swimming pool. While it looked nice, it wasn't bolted properly, which could potentially be a hazard for users. I simply wanted to bring this to the attention of the hotel management so they could address. Additionally, I noticed that the lobby could benefit from having air conditioning for a more comfortable welcome. Alternatively, having some industrial-rated fans to circulate air would also be a great solution. These are just small improvements that can easily be addressed by the hotel.

Please bear in mind that these suggestions should not deter you from staying at this incredible hotel. They are minor details that I believe can be easily fixed, and I regret not having had the opportunity to share them directly with the managers during my stay.

Overall, I had a fantastic time at this hotel, and I can't wait to return. The wonderful service and helpful employees truly made my stay memorable. I highly encourage others to experience the exceptional qualities of this hotel, while keeping in mind these minor suggestions for improvement.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
We had an amazing stay at this hotel and I’d love to share our experience!

First of all, I must say this was an incredibly positive experience. The hotel staff were exceptionally polite and always ready to assist with anything we needed. My husband and I have been in Vietnam for three months, and this was by far the best service and guest care we’ve encountered.

A special thanks to the lovely chefs and restaurant staff! While the breakfast menu is 90% traditional Vietnamese cuisine (with a small selection of vegetables, omelets, and bread), which might not entirely suit European tourists, they went out of their way to offer bacon and sweets every morning, which we thoroughly enjoyed. The personal touch they provided really stood out.

A huge thank you also to the wonderful ladies at reception. We experienced an issue with the internet in our room, and after calling reception to report it, a technician arrived within five minutes to fix the problem. Their efficiency and attentiveness were truly impressive.

The hotel’s location is also worth mentioning. You can easily get to the beautiful city of Hoi An for just 100,000 VND, directly to the city center—a fantastic perk!

One minor downside, however, was the slow internet. For someone like me who works online, it was a significant inconvenience and forced us to delay our plans for a week.

Overall, we had a fantastic stay and would highly recommend this hotel, especially for the exceptional service and attention to detail. Thank you to the entire team for making our time so enjoyable!

reviews.title: A good value place to sleep.
reviews.text:
Room was nice and clean. The pool was unusable for two days, murky green water, I couldn't even see the bottom. 
We ate dinner there once and had lunch by the (dirty) pool one of the days. Dinner was cheap but uninspired- the red snapper was dry and over cooked, came with fries (not creamy mashed potatoes as the menu stated) and mushy vegetables, service was very slow. Had a ceaser salad and pizza out by the pool, salad was bland and chicken tasted odd- pizza tasted like a cheap supermarket frozen crust. 
Hotel has private beach but there is no lifeguard or beach service, just some loungers chained to a post. 
Hotel is not near anything but to be fair the free shuttle bus offers a remedy to this.
The bar and restaurant was totally dead at night (although the hotel seemed quite full at breakfast times).
Hotel breakfast was good with plant of choice plus omelettes cooked to order.

reviews.title: Returning Guests
reviews.text:
This review may sound a little negative but in no way does it reflect the beautiful staff that work there.
We are returning guests after some years and we’re looking forward to our stay.
Our memories are of a cool huge entrance foyer, after a day out bike riding, big beautiful breakfasts with a huge array of options, great staff, bike riding and a shuttle bus to and from the old town.
Location is across the road from the beach.
Walking/bike riding distance to restaurants.
Check in quick and easy. We were informed after inquiring to the time of the shuttle bus service that the hotel does not provide this service and we would have to pay for bike rental.
Room large, and clean.
Big pool. Only 6 daybeds
Breakfast, stick to the egg station, whilst there is quite a few different options we used the egg station, juice watered down, breads stale.
No air conditioning in the foyer, lights are not turned on.
We just feel the hotel is trying to cut costs since we had our first stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Danielle Wilson,
Thank you for returning to Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel and for taking the time to share such detailed feedback with us.
We truly appreciate your kind words about our friendly staff and the convenient location near the beach and local restaurants.
We are, however, sorry to hear that some aspects of your recent stay did not fully meet your expectations compared to your previous experience. Your comments regarding the breakfast variety, lobby facilities, and shuttle service have been noted and shared with the relevant departments for improvement. Feedback from returning guests like yourself is incredibly valuable, and we take it seriously as we continue to enhance our services.
Once again, thank you for your support and trust. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back and provide a better experience on your next visit.
Kind regards, Pham Thuyen (Mr.) - General Manager

The resort is showing its age but sits in a prime beach front position and has a very large and well maintained outdoor pool. Restaurant staff go about their business quietly and an extensive menu offers something for everyone. Rooms all of good size, have good views of the beach or river and have all that is needed for a good stay. While a little out of the way the seclusion is good for those who like peace and quiet and the resort has a shuttle bus service into Hoi An town. A good resort for a relaxing break.

reviews.title: Great spot on a nice beach, but far from main town
reviews.text:
Great breakfast buffet, pool, and comfortable rooms.  The staff were helpful and played often with our kids.  The location I rated 3 stars since it’s really 5 stars for being on the beach but 1 star for being so far from anything else.  Fortunately the hotel offers a free shuttle to/from old Hoi An about 5 times a day.  Plus for food there are cheaper tasty restaurants 10min walk north to the intersection with Cua Dai road, or also south about 300m there are seafood restaurants popular with locals.  The hotel restaurant does have good food but is expensive.  

The beach was clean and had nice sand and waves for kids and adults to play in.  The hotel sets up free deck chairs and cushions for guests.  The pool and gym were also nice when it was too windy at the beach.

reviews.title: Excellent value for money but don't book tours via the hotel and beach filled with rubish
reviews.text: Relatively new hotel with excellent facilities (gym, pool, etc). Great large and comfortable rooms with fab bathroom! Great breakfast and service. Located approx. 6km from Hoi An, across a stretch of private beach (cove - so limited views of the long beach). Shuttle drop off and pick up available 4 times a day. Very convenient and reliable. The downsides included the cost  of the tours offered. For example, we opted to take the Marble Mountain tour. Well, it transpired that we were basically dropped off and picked up after 3hrs by the hotel shuttle. The driver didn't even tell us he was not staying and as we returned from viewing the temples we looked for him and realized we had to wait 1.5 hrs. Quite frustrating and literally a rip off. Entrance fee was only under a $1, whilst the "tour" cost 1.2Million Dong (approx. $70) for two. The distance to the mountain was exaggerated and if we cough a taxi it was cost us max. 500K Dong. The same applied to an airport drop off. You would be better off organizing it with one of the travel agencies in Hoi An, with options of a taxi or a shuttle which both were cheaper by 40% than what the hotel offered. On a final note, the strip of beach assigned to the hotel was absolutely filthy, with plastic bags, bottles, construction material galore. There were no lounges or umbrellas as implied by the photos. This may be due to us visiting in January a dry season (their winter) but nevertheless quite inexcusable.

reviews.title: Quiet beach location
reviews.text: We had a great 5 night stay at this hotel. We were after a resort-like feel in a good location for a decent price and we got it here. It is right across the street from the hotel's private beach and also has a nice little pool. The hotel is about a 5-10 min drive to Hoi An old town but the hotel provides a free shuttle bus to and from town 4 times a day. If you wanted to take a taxi it costs approx 80,000 vnd one way. Nice selection of food for breakfast, both western and Asian. There are some great eateries a 5 min walk down the road which we ate at every night.  Friendly and helpful staff, so overall it was a great stay!

reviews.title: Worth the price.
reviews.text:
Mường Thanh Holiday Hội An has prices that can be considered cheaper compared to other accommodations, the room amenities are still relatively comfortable, and it offers full services, especially with a spacious parking lot for cars and a swimming pool (but my family visited during the cold season, so it was not operational). 
However, there are a few drawbacks:
1. The street view is very poor, mostly construction sites.
2. It is 5km away from the old town, not too far but slightly inconvenient.
3. Breakfast does not serve local specialties from Quang Nam such as Mi Quang or Cao Lau (I previously stayed at Mường Thanh Luxury Sông Lam, which served eel soup). Instead, Mường Thanh Holiday Hội An serves pho, which is easy to eat but only comes with 2 extremely thin slices of meat.

The highlight of this hotel is the friendly and helpful staff. They booked taxis, scooter rental, tours, and air port shuttles for us. Best customer service in Asia this far. The only downside was the pool closer for an event on our last evening. I imagine this is common during the busy season. Their section of beach is also very quiet with great sand. Limited chairs and umbrellas so go early. The breakfast was good but would disappear quickly with the large tour groups they cater to. Other than that, very impressed.

Khách sạn xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ cảm nhận về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với nội thất phòng đẹp, mức giá hợp lý trong phân khúc 4 sao, hồ bơi rộng và đẹp, khu vực đỗ xe thoải mái cũng như vị trí thuận tiện gần biển. Những lời khen của Quý khách là nguồn động viên to lớn đối với toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên khách sạn.
Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng trân trọng ghi nhận ý kiến góp ý về bữa sáng chưa đa dạng và chưa thực sự phù hợp khẩu vị. Khách sạn sẽ xem xét cải thiện thực đơn trong thời gian tới để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho Quý khách.
Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong những kỳ nghỉ sắp tới.

reviews.title: Great place to stay opposite a sandy beach
reviews.text:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Muonh Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel.
The location suited us because it is opposite a good, clean sandy beach and has a great pool. Our Executive room was great, spotless and spacious and excellent value for money. The surrounding grounds are no longer what you see in the pictures, and this is because they are still recovering from the Covid crisis, where tourism was at a standstill. As is with many other resorts that did not survive that time. But that aside, we had a great time.Thank you to the staff who could not do enough to help us in every way.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Bob Newman,
Thank you very much for your lovely review and for choosing Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel.

reviews.title: a suitable resort for families
reviews.text: This place is suitable for families with young children and elderly people to rest. It is not too far from the center of Hoi An, so the family can easily go into the center, visit coconut groves, and explore tourist attractions in Hoi An. Just a few steps from the beach, the scenery is peaceful, not crowded or chaotic like in the city center, making it suitable for introverts who want to relax. It would be more convenient if the hotel had an electric shuttle for guests to go to the center like other hotels and resorts nearby, or added bike rental facilities...

reviews.title: Spacious Room, Beautiful Views, and Great Value”
reviews.text:
I stayed at Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel for 7 days and had a pleasant stay overall. The staff was courteous, my room was very spacious, and I had an amazing view of the hotel grounds and river, with beautiful sunsets. The hotel also has a huge ground-level pool. The Vietnamese-style breakfast buffet was included with the room and had lots of choices, and the food was tasty. The hotel is steps away from Cua Dai Beach and about a 10–15 minute drive from Hoi An Ancient Town, which was very convenient. Since it is right on the river, I definitely recommend wearing mosquito repellent from dusk to dawn because the mosquitoes are out in full force. On my last day, Sinh and Hung were especially kind and helpful, and the bellhop was always courteous with my luggage. My main suggestions would be to improve the shower water pressure and update the rooms a bit to make them feel more modern. Also, stepping up into the bathtub for the shower felt a little awkward. Overall, it’s a good choice for the low price and offers great value.

I’d rate this one a solid 4/5.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much for sharing your detailed review about your recent stay at Muong Thanh Holiday Hoi An Hotel. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed the spacious room, beautiful river views, convenient location, and the Vietnamese-style breakfast buffet.
Your kind compliments about our staff, especially Sinh and Hung, are truly appreciated and will certainly be shared with the team. At the same time, we also appreciate your helpful suggestions regarding the shower pressure and room facilities, which will be reviewed for further improvement.
Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future.
Kind regards, Tran Quoc Viet (Mr.) - General Manager

Khách sạn Mường Thanh Holiday Hội An chân thành cảm ơn gia đình đã lựa chọn chúng tôi là điểm dừng chân trong hành trình xuyên Việt và dành những lời chia sẻ rất đáng trân trọng.
Chúng tôi vô cùng vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với dịch vụ và sự đón tiếp tại khách sạn. Đặc biệt, lời khen dành cho chị Thảo tại quầy lễ tân là niềm động viên lớn đối với đội ngũ của chúng tôi. Sự hỗ trợ nhiệt tình trong việc vận chuyển hành lý cũng như những chia sẻ về kinh nghiệm du lịch Hội An chính là tinh thần phục vụ mà chúng tôi luôn hướng tới.
Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón gia đình Quý khách quay trở lại trong những hành trình tiếp theo.
Trân trọng, Tran Van Luan (Mr.) - General Manager
